name: Urad Dal Ki Roti
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the urad dal for a few minutes or soak overnight. Drain and grind coarsely.
2. Fry the ground dal and dry spices (ginger, coriander, chili powder) in 3 tablespoons ghee for a few minutes until lightly golden. Cook, covered, over low heat until the dal is cooked through. Remove from heat and let it cool slightly.
3. Mix the cooled dal mixture with flour, chopped onions, minced chilies, coriander leaves, and crushed pomegranate seeds. Gradually add water to form a stiff dough. Knead well.
4. Divide the dough into lemon-sized balls. Roll each ball into a thin circle.
5. Heat oil in a frying pan. Fry each rolled roti until golden brown on both sides. Serve hot.
